import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/types";

export const ayuTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#5a6673",
    focusColor: "#3fb7e3",
    style: "round",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#f2856f",
    accentForeground: "#0f1419",
    background: "#0f1419",
    border: "#5a6673",
    error: "#f58572",
    errorForeground: "#0f1419",
    focusRing: "#3fb7e3",
    foreground: "#d6dae0",
    info: "#66c6f1",
    infoForeground: "#0f1419",
    muted: "#1e2229",
    mutedForeground: "#5a6673",
    primary: "#3fb7e3",
    primaryForeground: "#0f1419",
    secondary: "#242a33",
    secondaryForeground: "#d6dae0",
    selection: "#3fb7e3",
    selectionForeground: "#0f1419",
    success: "#78d05c",
    successForeground: "#0f1419",
    warning: "#e4a75c",
    warningForeground: "#0f1419",
  },
  name: "ayu",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
